# Fixture: p6b_work_experience_app_blocked
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 7.7s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Jerold! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I can't get in the app because the app wants me to upload my job experience

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
That sounds like a bug with the work experience screen. Try using a shorter search term or typing "Self-employed" or "N/A" if you can't find your employer. If the field won't let you type at all, quit the app fully and reopen it.
